---
name: Minor enhancement
about: Suggest a minor enhancement to the product
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---

## Describe the limitation you are encountering with the current system
A clear and concise description of what you find lacking, e.g. "at the moment it's not possible to change X...", or "it would be easier to understand Y if it was presented like this...".

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear concise description of how you would like to see the problem solved.

## Describe any alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Current workarounds
Is there currenty a workaround for the limitation you've identified? If so, describe it (including noting how/why it's inconvenient or ineffective).

## Additional context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
